description_long: This is an adult male figure with a medium build, standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He has a full beard and short, tousled hair, giving him a rugged appearance. He is dressed in a long-sleeve, fitted shirt with subtle horizontal striping and a V-neck, paired with straight-cut pants. The shoes are simple and closed-toe, suitable for walking in an urban environment. The facial features are well-defined, and the hands are open with fingers slightly spread. The overall look suggests a casual, everyday pedestrian commonly seen in city streets or parks.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a beard, short tousled hair, and a fitted shirt and pants, standing in a T-pose. The figure has a rugged, urban appearance and is ready for use as a city pedestrian.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, beard, V-neck shirt, and open hands with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the fit of the shirt and pants, and the shoe shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shirt, and pants, with arms outstretched and no facial details visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and leg alignment.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve casual shirt and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
